message:
fix(store): fix ScoreBound::NegInf/PosInf compile error in test

Replace non-existent ScoreBound::NegInf and ScoreBound::PosInf with
ScoreBound::Inclusive(f64::NEG_INFINITY) and ScoreBound::Inclusive(f64::INFINITY)
in the zrangebyscore test added by commit b5eb6e9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
